title: Reset Device - Clear Trusted Devices - Clear - Yes
scenario: Clear Trusted Devices via Device Settings > Reset Device removes headset from My Devices and requires re-pairing in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Under 'Clear Trusted Devices', tap the 'Clear' button.
5. A warning popup appears: 'This will clear all trusted devices. Device power-off is required and activity/call may be interrupted.' Tap 'Yes' to confirm.
6. Observe the headset behavior and the app UI.
expected: The headset disconnects from the phone and is removed from the 'My Devices' list in the phone's Bluetooth settings. The headset appears only under 'Other Devices' (or 'Available Devices'), ready for re-pairing.
